summary: Tested 6 new features for Trend Syria e-commerce app: 1) TTS Voice Announcement Settings for drivers - PASS 2) FeedbackButton visibility for delivery users - PASS 3) Chat page for driver-customer communication - PASS 4) Browse as Customer feature - PASS 5) Map with route buttons - PASS 6) Rejected orders persistence - Code review only (localStorage implementation verified)

minor.issue: Returns 401 for driver user - authentication issue

issues: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in SettingsPage - minor React warning

critical_code_review_comments: VoiceAnnouncementSettings.js - Well implemented with proper localStorage persistence, voice selection, volume/rate/pitch controls, and test functionality
FeedbackButton.js - Correctly positioned at bottom-28 left-4 with z-[55] for delivery users, includes hide functionality with sessionStorage
ChatPage.js - Properly implements quick messages, message input, and phone call button for driver-customer communication
HomeRouter.js - Correctly handles ?view=customer parameter to show customer homepage for sellers/drivers/admins
OrdersMap.js - Comprehensive map implementation with Leaflet, route calculation via OSRM, and proper marker handling
SettingsPage.js - 'تصفح كعميل' button correctly shows for all user types except 'buyer'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 features tested and working: 1) TTS settings in Settings > النغمات tab with voice toggle, voice select, volume/rate/pitch sliders, test button 2) FeedbackButton visible for drivers at bottom-left 3) ChatPage at /chat/:orderId shows quick messages and message input 4) /?view=customer shows customer homepage for non-buyers 5) Map shows routes with المطعم/العميل/المسار buttons, Leaflet map with OSRM routing 6) Rejected orders saved to localStorage with timestamp

rejected_orders_persistence.implementation: localStorage with timestamp, auto-cleanup after 1 hour
